description: My Business Place Actions is part of Google Business Profile APIs and lets authorized developers manage action links, such as booking or ordering links, associated with business locations on Google. It also exposes metadata about available place action types by location or region.
summary: Google's My Business Place Actions surface consists of one REST API at mybusinessplaceactions.googleapis.com for managing place action links, authenticated with either Google OAuth 2.0 user access tokens or a Google Cloud API key.
